'''dakada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycoinsecticide|mycoinsecticide]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-k-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycoinsecticide|mycoinsecticide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dakada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dækædæth|dækædæth]] || [[word:dækædæj|dækædæj]] || [[word:dækædæsh|dækædæsh]] || [[word:dækædæ|dækædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dakakadath|dakakadath]] || [[word:dakakadaj|dakakadaj]] || [[word:dakakadash|dakakadash]] || [[word:dakakada|dakakada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dakadath|dakadath]] || [[word:dakadaj|dakadaj]] || [[word:dakadash|dakadash]] || [[word:dakada|dakada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dakafdath|dakafdath]] || [[word:dakafdaj|dakafdaj]] || [[word:dakafdash|dakafdash]] || [[word:dakafdaf|dakafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dakadatha|dakadatha]] || [[word:dakadaja|dakadaja]] || [[word:dakadasha|dakadasha]] || [[word:dakadaka|dakadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dakadath|dakadath]] || [[word:dakadaj|dakadaj]] || [[word:dakadash|dakadash]] || [[word:dakada|dakada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dakadathal|dakadathal]] || [[word:dakadajal|dakadajal]] || [[word:dakadashal|dakadashal]] || [[word:dakadakal|dakadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dakadathatha|dakadathatha]] || [[word:dakadajaja|dakadajaja]] || [[word:dakadashasha|dakadashasha]] || [[word:dakadaka|dakadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dakadathan|dakadathan]] || [[word:dakadajan|dakadajan]] || [[word:dakadashan|dakadashan]] || [[word:dakadakan|dakadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dakadathaoro|dakadathaoro]] || [[word:dakadajaoro|dakadajaoro]] || [[word:dakadashaoro|dakadashaoro]] || [[word:dakadakaoro|dakadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
